initiative_name: Territorial Climate Energy Plan of Dakar 2021-2025 / 9.3 Operational Adaptation and Mitigation Action Plan
parent_statement: Implement the Territorial Climate Energy Plan (PCET) / Dakar Climate Action Plan structured around strategic axes and operational adaptation and mitigation actions for 2021–2025 and longer-term horizons.
coverage_assessment: The parent statement indicates a multi-axis plan with 22 actions across climate/energy/urban planning/risk management, but no sub-actions are actually provided in the verbatim text. As a result, we cannot verify that any operational actions exist to cover the stated goals.
coherence_assessment: At the header level, the initiative is thematically coherent (strategic axes integrating climate, energy, urban planning, risk/disaster management, and living environment). However, without the listed actions, coherence between components cannot be evaluated.
weak_signals: no sub-actions provided, no quantified outcomes, no explicit deadlines for actions (beyond general 2021–2025 mention), descriptive/structural language only
strong_signals: 2021–2025 plan horizon, structured into 7 strategic axes, references 22 adaptation and mitigation actions
initiative_reasoning: 1) The initiative aims to implement Dakar’s Territorial Climate Energy Plan/Climate Action Plan, organized into 7 strategic axes and (stated) 22 adaptation and mitigation actions, within a 2021–2025 operational horizon. 2) Sub-actions provided: 0 total (so strong/moderate/weak counts are 0/0/0). 3) The parent provides an implied city/institutional scope (Dakar) but does not state any binding mechanism (e.g., ordinance/mandate) and does not provide the operational actions themselves, so there is no inherited enforceability that can lift missing sub-action detail. 4) Coverage is very low because none of the operational actions are present to demonstrate delivery against the parent goal; coherence cannot be confirmed without seeing how actions relate and sequence. 5) Applying the INITIATIVE SOUNDNESS RULE: it cannot be SOUND (no measurability; no strong sub-actions). It also cannot be PARTIAL because there is no measurable target/deadline within the cluster beyond a general plan period and there are no sub-actions. Therefore the initiative is WEAK as presented here, with moderate confidence driven by the clear absence of actionable/quantifiable content in the provided verbatim text.
